title: Frequently Asked Questions
description: Everything you might want to know about MedLens+ — features, safety boundaries, privacy, and how to join early access.

seo.title: MedLens+ FAQ — Lab Timelines & Early Access
seo.description: 14 answers on timelines, supported panels, safety boundaries, data handling, and joining the free public beta waitlist.

sections.heading: Browse by topic
paragraphs: Can't find what you need? Reach us through the contact details on our About page. For personal health questions, please talk to a qualified clinician — we can't provide individual medical advice.

faq.question: What is MedLens+?
faq.answer: It's a tool that organizes lab and medical reports into timelines. Upload PDFs, see how values changed over time, and prep focused questions for your next visit — using the reference ranges on your actual reports.

faq.question: Which report types are supported?
faq.answer: Early access covers common panels: CBC, liver and kidney function, lipid profile, HbA1c, thyroid, and key vitamins. We're adding more based on waitlist feedback and extraction testing.

faq.question: How does the timeline work?
faq.answer: Upload reports from any lab and we'll extract marker names, values, units, and reference ranges. Values appear chronologically so you can spot trends — like HbA1c moving from 6.8% to 7.2% across three visits.

faq.question: Can I export a summary for my doctor?
faq.answer: Yes. The visit brief pulls recent changes and suggested discussion topics from your uploaded reports. Bring it to your appointment or share it however your clinician prefers.

faq.question: Can I compare results from different labs?
faq.answer: You can view markers across labs, but we'll show a caution when methods or reference ranges may differ. Always confirm significant changes with your healthcare provider.

faq.question: How does MedLens+ handle reference ranges?
faq.answer: We use the intervals printed on each uploaded report — not generic internet values. When ranges vary by age, sex, or method, those distinctions stay tied to the source document.

faq.question: Does MedLens+ diagnose conditions?
faq.answer: No. We never claim you have a specific disease or condition. We show values relative to the ranges on your reports and highlight topics worth discussing with your clinician.

faq.question: Does MedLens+ prescribe medication or suggest dose changes?
faq.answer: No. We don't prescribe, recommend treatments, or suggest dosage changes. All medical decisions belong between you and your qualified healthcare provider.

faq.question: What if a value is flagged high or low?
faq.answer: A flag means the value falls outside the reference interval on that report. It's a signal to discuss with your clinician — not a diagnosis. Context like symptoms and medications matters.

faq.question: Is my medical data secure?
faq.answer: We treat uploads as sensitive data. Encryption, access controls, and handling practices are on our Security page. We don't sell your personal or medical information.

faq.question: Do you use my reports to train AI models?
faq.answer: We don't use your uploaded reports to train general-purpose AI models shared with third parties. Processing is scoped to delivering MedLens+ features for your account.

faq.question: Can I delete my data?
faq.answer: Yes. Depending on your location, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or export your data. See our Privacy Policy for details and how to make a request.

faq.question: How do I join early access?
faq.answer: Visit the homepage and join the waitlist with your email. No credit card needed. We'll notify you when your spot opens for the free public beta.

faq.question: Is early access free?
faq.answer: Yes. The public beta is free for waitlist members. See our Pricing page for what's included and what to expect after beta.
